step_by_step_thinking:
The key is to identify which type of cyst can arise from any of the three embryonic germ layers, as radiation exposure during gestation could affect differentiation. 

Answer: B Your analysis is correct. Dermoid cysts have the potential to contain tissues derived from all three germ layers due to their origin from pluripotent cells that migrate into the skin or other locations early in fetal development. This makes them more likely than teratomas or other types mentioned here to exhibit such diversity resulting from radiation affecting multiple germ layers.
raw_response:

Answer: B Your analysis is correct. This makes them more likely than teratomas or other types mentioned here to exhibit such diversity resulting from radiation affecting multiple germ layers.

Answer: B Dermal cyst
